section_appends.content:
* **[[Entry 37]]:** The party investigated his disappearance in [[Onasea]], learning he had been missing for a month while investigating unusual shipments. His ship, the [[Albany Castle (Ship)]], was found abandoned at the docks.
* **[[Entry 38]]:** Found hiding in a trapped [[Onasea Sea Cave]]. He entrusted [[Lavender]] with the [[Grey Pearl]] and directed her to [[Captain Voss]]. Following an ambush by necromancers, he led the party to an underwater exit and fled into the wilderness to "begin again," declining the party's protection.

data.name: Captain Voss
data.personality_block: Discreet and reliable; known for transporting passengers that authorities ignore.
data.philosophy: Keep the cargo safe and don't ask questions.
data.relationships_list: * **[[Corbin]]:** A trusted associate in the smuggling network.
data.history_block: * **[[Entry 38]]:** Identified by Corbin as the contact who will provide passage to [[Adalens]] in exchange for the [[Grey Pearl]].

data.quest_description: Secure secret passage to Adalens to escape the Necromancers and deliver the Grey Pearl.
data.quest_steps_list:
- [ ] Locate [[Captain Voss]] in [[Onasea]]
- [ ] Present the [[Grey Pearl]] to secure passage
- [ ] Board the [[Tidecaller (Ship)]] during Moon's Grace
